title: Routing, Selection, Translation, and Redundancy · Incident Case: Net Routing Table Forwarding
summary: Connect branch, headquarters, cloud, and internet routes while diagnosing asymmetry and failover. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net routing table forwarding increment in a routed hybrid branch design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Read connected, static, dynamic, default, and host routes and select the longest matching destination prefix.
Manage network templates, playbooks, inventories, source control, review, conflict, drift, upgrade, and rollback evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
